Off Calendar Jul-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Respondent's motion to compel the attendance of Sun Shun Tse at deposition in San Francisco is granted conditioned upon respondent advancing reasonable expenses for accommodation and costs of travel to San Francisco, California. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time for the deposition. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
